englishTranslation: In the name of Allah, the Most Compassionate, the Most Merciful.
All praise belongs to Allah, Lord of all worlds.
The Most Compassionate, the Most Merciful.
Master of the Day of Judgment.
You alone we worship, and You alone we ask for help.
Guide us to the straight path.

arabicText: صِرَاطَ الَّذِينَ أَنْعَمْتَ عَلَيْهِمْ غَيْرِ الْمَغْضُوبِ عَلَيْهِمْ وَلَا الضَّالِّينَ
englishTranslation: The path of those You have blessed, not of those who earned anger, nor of those who went astray.

arabicText: ذَٰلِكَ الْكِتَابُ لَا رَيْبَ فِيهِ هُدًى لِّلْمُتَّقِينَ
englishTranslation: This is the Book with no doubt in it, a guidance for those mindful of Allah.

arabicText: الَّذِينَ يُؤْمِنُونَ بِالْغَيْبِ وَيُقِيمُونَ الصَّلَاةَ وَمِمَّا رَزَقْنَاهُمْ يُنفِقُونَ
englishTranslation: Those who believe in the unseen, establish prayer, and spend from what We have provided them.

arabicText: وَالَّذِينَ يُؤْمِنُونَ بِمَا أُنزِلَ إِلَيْكَ وَمَا أُنزِلَ مِن قَبْلِكَ وَبِالْآخِرَةِ هُمْ يُوقِنُونَ
englishTranslation: Those who believe in what was sent to you, what was sent before you, and are certain of the Hereafter.

arabicText: أُولَٰئِكَ عَلَىٰ هُدًى مِّن رَّبِّهِمْ وَأُولَٰئِكَ هُمُ الْمُفْلِحُونَ
englishTranslation: They are upon guidance from their Lord, and they are the successful.
He neither begets nor is born.
And nothing is comparable to Him.
Say: I seek refuge in the Lord of daybreak.
Say: I seek refuge in the Lord of mankind.
